Not only did this improve his efficiency, but it also reduced his stress levels significantly. Curious to try more methods, he then explored the concept of a morning routine. Every day, he dedicated 30 minutes to meditation and planning before starting his tasks. Delighted with the results, Alex realized he had unlocked a new level of productivity in his life.
